reviews.comment:
Cuando mis hijos estudiaban en la UN del Centro, siendo socios visitabamos seguido Tandil, hermosa ciudad, y siendo socios siempre cargamos combustible en ACA Tandil

(Translated by Google)
When my children were studying at the National University of the Center, as members we frequently visited Tandil, a beautiful city, and as members we always filled up our tanks at ACA Tandil.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlbWVEWVV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Como siempre el lugar obligado en todo viaje por Argentina.
Buen servicio,

(Translated by Google)
As always, a must-visit on any trip to Argentina.
Great service.

reviews.comment:
Bien el servicio de los chicos q surten gasolinas, pero mala la organización para acceder. Se les va de la mano xq la gente es maleducada no espera el turno y se mete adelante tirando el auto.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas boys is good, but the access is poor. They get carried away because people are rude, don't wait their turn, and just drive ahead, throwing their cars away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlNXNhSjR3RRAB
